place: Samsara Estate, Kamala, Kathu District, Phuket 83150, Thailand
title: Scandinavian-Modern Oceanfront Villa with 15-Metre Infinity Pool, Kamala
blurb: The most modern villa in Phuket's exclusive Samsara estate — a direct-oceanfront retreat 50 metres above the Andaman, where Scandinavian design meets bold art, floor-to-ceiling glass retracts to the sea, and a 15-metre infinity pool runs toward a west-facing sunset sala.
detail:
Perched in a direct oceanfront position 50 metres above the Andaman Sea within Kamala's exclusive Samsara estate, Oceanview Retreat is the estate's most contemporary home — a confident blend of Scandinavian design and bold contemporary art across expansive, light-filled living spaces. Retractable floor-to-ceiling doors open every room to panoramic sea views, dissolving the line between the interiors and the horizon.

The upper level holds the open-plan kitchen and living areas that flow out to a 15-metre infinity-edge pool overlooking the water, with a covered west-facing sala for sunsets, an outdoor whirlpool, a shaded alfresco BBQ and dining area, sun loungers and a daybed. Downstairs, a private bar, a media lounge with a 65-inch screen and a games room with a pool table make entertaining effortless.

All five bedrooms sit on the garden level, including a master suite with a wraparound terrace and an ocean-view jacuzzi; a fifth room with Murphy beds flexes for children or extra guests. Designed for adult groups, families and corporate retreats, it pairs high-end amenities — home office, smart TVs, fast Wi-Fi — with private-chef and concierge services on request, minutes from Kamala Beach.

features.l: Direct oceanfront, 50 m above the sea
